title: Ciudad de la Costa, CA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ciudad de la Costa, CA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ciudad de la Costa is a city in CA with a population of 120,000. A rapidly growing coastal suburb of Montevideo, a residential area with beautiful beaches along the Río de la Plata.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
